title: Density-Based Spatial Clustering (DBSCAN) Process Flow
description: A flowchart illustrating the core process and logic of the DBSCAN algorithm for identifying core points, border points, and noise based on density.
relationships: Process starts with an unvisited point; if it has enough neighbors, it becomes a Core Point and a new Cluster is formed from all its density-connected points; points reached that don't have enough neighbors are labeled Border Points; points never reached are labeled Noise
